name: perceived_education_quality
description: Respondent's overall evaluation of the quality of education in Mexico, including perceived trends over time, a numeric rating, and belief about whether school content is relevant to real life and work.

name: educational_returns_belief
description: Respondent's beliefs about the instrumental and social value of education, including whether studying improves employment prospects, income, and societal well-being, and whether it is generally worthwhile.

name: school_environment_quality
description: Respondent's assessment of the physical and social conditions of their current school, including facility condition, safety perception, adequacy of laboratories, and teacher engagement with students.

name: educational_inclusion_equity
description: Respondent's perceptions of fairness and access in the educational system, including whether school is an option for all, whether there is capacity for all students, unfavorable treatment of women, and barriers faced by students with disabilities.

name: digital_and_cultural_capital
description: Respondent's access to and use of information and communication technologies, reading habits, and cultural participation, reflecting the stock of resources available for informal learning and social engagement.
